sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unseren aktuellen Low Budget Spielfilm Fantasy/Horror suchen wir noch weibliche Darstellerinnen Rolle: Schöne junge Frauen (mit Dialog). Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, ab März 2026. Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, (bitte auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo euch), sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße und Schuhgröße an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an  Harlekin Filme Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße euer Harlekin Filme Team

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎Casting do etiudy Szkoły Filmowej w Łodzi 14-16.04 w odizolowanej wsi młoda uzdrowicielka, wykluczana jako „wiedząca kobieta", potajemnie próbuje uratować smiertelnie chore dziecko. Gdy chłopiec umiera, społeczność skazuje ją na spalenie aż aż jeden z rodziców musi wybrać między strachem tłumu a własnym sumieniem. Potrzebni: mężczyzna 30-40l. l. -kobieta 30-40 40 .ا -kobieta 45-55l. -chłopiec 10-13 l. Oferta on-profit, szczegóły w wiadomości prywantej‎'‎

items.text:
**Bądź COOL ! 😎  Zgłoś się na C A S T I N G i poczuj vibe !🖤   **

**Szukamy ekipy, która zrobi robotę spojrzeniem, pauzą i jednym „serio?”** 😏 

**👉 KOGO SZUKAMY?**
• 4 główne role (18–24) – naturalność, świeża energia, komedia z reakcji (nie „na siłę”)
• 2 epizody (35–50) – autobusowi „normalsi”, zero przerysowania

**👉 WAŻNE**
**• gramy subtelnie, ale na poziomie**
**• inkluzywnie – open call (także people of color)**
**• modele? tak, jeśli OGARNIACIE aktorstwo 😉**
**• role główne – mówione**
**• na planie jemy 🍔 (mięso wchodzi w grę)**

👉 **ROLE GŁÓWNE**
CHUDY – wrażliwy, trochę nerd, 100% autentyk
SANDRA – błyskotliwa, ironiczna outsiderka
RUDY – energia, serce grupy, lekka teatralność
TOLA – szybka, ekspresyjna, emocje x2

📍 Warszawa | 2–3 dni zdjęciowe

👉 **EPIZODY**
K/M 35–50 – naturalni, obserwacyjna komedia (WYSTARCZY WIZYTÓWKA)

📅 **DO KIEDY ZGŁOSZENIA?!**
• zgłoszenia: do 22.03 (do północy)
• recall: 26.03
• zdjęcia: 31.03–1.04 (+ możliwy 3 dzień)

**🍓GDZIE WYSYŁAMY?**

**tytuł maila : 006**

**adres: CASTING@UNAGIMEDIA.PL**

🎥** CO NAGRAĆ?**
• wizytówka ( koniecznie dodaj coś od siebie, opowiedz w 2/3 zdaniach, pokaż profile oraz dłonie!) + zdjęcie portretowe (wyraźne) oraz sylwetki
• scena (wg opisu dla roli - szukaj na końcu ogłoszenia)
• epizody – tylko wizytówka

**SKONTAKTUJEMY SIĘ Z WYBRANYMI OSOBAMI! **

**Dajcie czadu! :)))) ❤️‍🔥**

**🎥SCENY DO GŁÓWNYCH POSTACI:**

** **

**👉 SCENA DLA DZIEWCZYN**
📍 Szkolna czytelnia

Chłopak siedzi nad książką.
Dziewczyna podchodzi:
„Muszę ci coś powiedzieć…”

On powoli podnosi głowę… i odpływa.
Za bardzo. Za romantycznie.

Dziewczyna pstryka palcami przed jego twarzą.
Wracaj na ziemię 😅

On wraca.

Ona, lekko skrępowana:
„Wiadomość od Rudego.
O 15 widzimy się w Maku.”

Wskazuje na okno.

**👉 SCENA DLA CHŁOPAKÓW**
📍 Stolik, napięcie jak przed wielkim wyznaniem

Chłopak siedzi.
Nerwowo miętosi chusteczkę.
Czeka. Stres wisi w powietrzu.

Dosadza się reszta.
Cisza.

Wszyscy patrzą.

On przełyka ślinę i w końcu:
„Polubiłem jej zdjęcie z 2018.”

…cisza.

Spojrzenia.

I nagle – wybuch śmiechu 😂
Każdy reaguje po swojemu.

Dziewczyna przytula go:
„Masz moje frytki. Dzisiaj ja stawiam.”

**PAMIĘTAJCIE:**

**✨ Szukamy prawdy, nie przerysowania**
**✨ Reakcja > tekst**
**✨ Subtelność robi robotę**

ENERGY-BRINGERS CALL  | LONDON ⚓

Ahoy! Looking for 4–5 HIGH-ENERGY performers to play sailors in a fun, lively music video shoot ⎈

Think:

– Rowdy pub vibes

– Singing, cheering, hyping up the scene

– Big personalities encouraged

📍 Central London 

💰 Small fee available 

📅 30th March 2026

Great opportunity for performers/actors/dancers looking for experience + footage.

Please email your name and a quick intro/video to matt@chew.productions

AUDITIONS OPEN FOR LEADING MAN ROLE FOR NEARLYWEDS THE MUSICAL 
Playing age 25-35 
Tenor - Must have excellent vocal and acting ability 

JAKE - A smooth talking salesman with a love for jokes and puns! 

Shows will be in mainly London and Edinburgh (Fringe) so when submitting, please mention if you have a base in either one or both. All show dates are listed in the Audition Pack.
Please submit your tapes by 28th March to be considered. 

www.instagram.com/nearlywedsthemusical

items.text:
🎬 **REAL COUPLES WANTED — Beijing Film Academy MFA Thesis Short Films**

Hi Vancouver! I'm a grad student at **Beijing Film Academy** (one of the top film schools in Asia), and I'm shooting **three short ad films** for my MFA thesis project here in Vancouver.

**The concept:** Three everyday scenarios between a couple — eating hot pot, relaxing in/around water, and jumping on a bed together — filmed with a cinematic, dreamlike visual style. Think slow motion, close-ups, and beautiful lighting. The films explore how ordinary moments between two people can feel extraordinary.

**What you'd be doing:** — Eating hot pot together (feeding each other, reacting to spicy food, lounging on the couch after) — Interacting around water (splashing, getting close, leaning against each other) — Jumping and bouncing on a bed together (pillow fights, flopping down, catching your breath side by side)

Some scenes include light physical closeness — hugs, holding each other, a camera-angled kiss (no actual lip contact). Everything is shot tastefully and artistically. This is an academic film project, not a commercial shoot.

**What I need:** ✅ A real couple ✅ Ages 20–38

📅 **March 27 or 28** (one day, within 8 hours) 

Interested? DM me and I'll share the full concept + storyboards!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'FREEFALL Real Couples Wanted Beijing Film Academy MFA Thesis BeijigFlimAtademyMEAThesisProject Project :； March 27 or 28 One Day 8 Hours Vancouver $ Paid: $100 CAD Per Person DM or Email for Full Details 357045123a@gmail.com @gmail.com 357045123'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL FOR SHORT FILM - PLAN JINN**

SHORT FILM | UBCP ULB | OPEN TO UNION/NON-UNION ACTORS | HONORARIUM

FILMING DATES: ARPIL 17-19

LOCATION: VANCOUVER, BC

DIRECTOR/WRITER: ZEESHAN DHANANI

EMAIL YOUR HEADSHOTS, DEMO-REEL, CV to: info@yymediaco.com

 

**Characters: **

**Ayesha - Lead - Female - South Asian (20-25)**

A creative, intelligent, emotionally repressed young woman torn between filial duty and personal freedom. Sensitive yet quietly defiant. Has a deep inner life, theatre lover, former painter, dreamer.

 

**Ali (Baba) - Supporting - male - South Asian (50-60)**

A hardworking immigrant father who believes security equals love. Authoritative but not villainous, he truly believes he is protecting his daughter. Carries pride, fear, and generational trauma.

 

**Fatima (ammi) - Supporting - female - South Asian (50-60)**

A gentle, deeply conditioned woman who once lived Ayesha’s fate. Torn between empathy and survival. Her silence carries decades of compromise.

 

**Imam - principal - male - Open ethnicity (40-60)**

Calm, authoritative spiritual leader called to perform an exorcism. Grounded presence amid chaos.Requires strong vocal presence. Ritual recitation (Quran verses). Controlled physical blocking during exorcism.

**Mystic - principal - Female- Open ethnicity (30-70)**

A mysterious spiritual healer whose true nature may not be human. Calm, enigmatic, unsettling.

items.text:
METHOD OF MADNESS - CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: *when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?*

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go

method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

There will be a breakdown on a file attached as well but as for the character breakdowns:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: [methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com) and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 08. The callbacks will be on April 15th and April 16th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. Please note that this set will be unpaid however, crafty will be on set. 

We hope to hear from you :)

items.text:
🎻 **CASTING BACKGROUND ARTISTS – SHORT FILM (LA)**

We’re seeking **background performers to portray orchestra musicians** or **audience members** for a short film shooting in Los Angeles.

**ORCHESTRA:**
• Age: 18–35
• All genders and ethnicities encouraged
• Should be able to **convincingly play an orchestral instrument on camera**
• Musicians welcome to bring their instrument for visual realism
• **No music will be performed or recorded** (visual only)

**AUDIENCE:**

• Age: 18+

• All genders and ethnicities encouraged

**Shoot Dates:** April 4–5, 2026 (may work one or both days)
**Location:** Los Angeles
**Union:** SAG-AFTRA Micro-Budget Agreement

**Compensation:**
Meals provided + credit + copy of the film

**To submit:**
Email **[kelleyewerner@gmail.com](mailto:kelleyewerner@gmail.com)** with:

• Name
• Playable age
• Instrument(s) you play (if applicable)
• Phone number
• Photo/headshot
• Availability (April 4 and/or 5)

**Subject line:**
Concerto Background Submission – Your Name + Orchestra OR Audience

“In rural England, a hearing impaired teenager is guided by a mysterious boy on a journey through forgotten places, each confronting him with the emotions of adolescence.”

We are looking for 2 actors as shown in the casting call, ideally for actors who are hearing impaired and or know sign language.

If interested, please contact lily with the contact details below.

items.text:
**Bądź COOL ! 😎  Zgłoś się na C A S T I N G i poczuj vibe !🖤   **

**Szukamy ekipy, która zrobi robotę spojrzeniem, pauzą i jednym „serio?”** 😏 

**👉 KOGO SZUKAMY?**
• 4 główne role (18–24) – naturalność, świeża energia, komedia z reakcji (nie „na siłę”)
• 2 epizody (35–50) – autobusowi „normalsi”, zero przerysowania

**👉 WAŻNE**
**• gramy subtelnie, ale na poziomie**
**• inkluzywnie – open call (także people of color)**
**• modele? tak, jeśli OGARNIACIE aktorstwo 😉**
**• role główne – mówione**
**• na planie jemy 🍔 (mięso wchodzi w grę)**

👉 **ROLE GŁÓWNE**
CHUDY – wrażliwy, trochę nerd, 100% autentyk
SANDRA – błyskotliwa, ironiczna outsiderka
RUDY – energia, serce grupy, lekka teatralność
TOLA – szybka, ekspresyjna, emocje x2

📍 Warszawa | 2–3 dni zdjęciowe

👉 **EPIZODY**
K/M 35–50 – naturalni, obserwacyjna komedia (WYSTARCZY WIZYTÓWKA)

📅 **DO KIEDY ZGŁOSZENIA?!**
• zgłoszenia: do 22.03 (do północy)
• recall: 26.03
• zdjęcia: 31.03–1.04 (+ możliwy 3 dzień)

**🍓GDZIE WYSYŁAMY?**

**tytuł maila : 006**

**adres: CASTING@UNAGIMEDIA.PL**

🎥** CO NAGRAĆ?**
• wizytówka ( koniecznie dodaj coś od siebie, opowiedz w 2/3 zdaniach, pokaż profile oraz dłonie!) + zdjęcie portretowe (wyraźne) oraz sylwetki
• scena (wg opisu dla roli - szukaj na końcu ogłoszenia)
• epizody – tylko wizytówka

**SKONTAKTUJEMY SIĘ Z WYBRANYMI OSOBAMI! **

**Dajcie czadu! :)))) ❤️‍🔥**

**🎥SCENY DO GŁÓWNYCH POSTACI:**

** **

**👉 SCENA DLA DZIEWCZYN**
📍 Szkolna czytelnia

Chłopak siedzi nad książką.
Dziewczyna podchodzi:
„Muszę ci coś powiedzieć…”

On powoli podnosi głowę… i odpływa.
Za bardzo. Za romantycznie.

Dziewczyna pstryka palcami przed jego twarzą.
Wracaj na ziemię 😅

On wraca.

Ona, lekko skrępowana:
„Wiadomość od Rudego.
O 15 widzimy się w Maku.”

Wskazuje na okno.

**👉 SCENA DLA CHŁOPAKÓW**
📍 Stolik, napięcie jak przed wielkim wyznaniem

Chłopak siedzi.
Nerwowo miętosi chusteczkę.
Czeka. Stres wisi w powietrzu.

Dosadza się reszta.
Cisza.

Wszyscy patrzą.

On przełyka ślinę i w końcu:
„Polubiłem jej zdjęcie z 2018.”

…cisza.

Spojrzenia.

I nagle – wybuch śmiechu 😂
Każdy reaguje po swojemu.

Dziewczyna przytula go:
„Masz moje frytki. Dzisiaj ja stawiam.”

**PAMIĘTAJCIE:**

**✨ Szukamy prawdy, nie przerysowania**
**✨ Reakcja > tekst**
**✨ Subtelność robi robotę**

„Polubiłem jej zdjęcie z 2018.”

…cisza.

Spojrzenia.

I nagle – wybuch śmiechu 😂
Każdy reaguje po swojemu.

Dziewczyna przytula go:
„Masz moje frytki. Dzisiaj ja stawiam.”

**PAMIĘTAJCIE:**

**✨ Szukamy prawdy, nie przerysowania**
**✨ Reakcja > tekst**
**✨ Subtelność robi robotę**
items.title: **Bądź COOL ! 😎  Zgłoś się na C A S T I N G i poczuj vibe !🖤   **

items.text:
Bądź COOL ! 😎 Zgłoś się na C A S T I N G i poczuj vibe !🖤

Szukamy ekipy, która zrobi robotę spojrzeniem, pauzą i jednym „serio?” 😏

👉 KOGO SZUKAMY?

• 4 główne role (18–24) – naturalność, świeża energia, komedia z reakcji (nie „na siłę”)

• 2 epizody (35–50) – autobusowi „normalsi”, zero przerysowania

👉 WAŻNE

• gramy subtelnie, ale na poziomie

• inkluzywnie – open call (także people of color)

• modele? tak, jeśli OGARNIACIE aktorstwo 😉

• role główne – mówione

• na planie jemy 🍔 (mięso wchodzi w grę)

👉 ROLE GŁÓWNE

CHUDY – wrażliwy, trochę nerd, 100% autentyk

SANDRA – błyskotliwa, ironiczna outsiderka

RUDY – energia, serce grupy, lekka teatralność

TOLA – szybka, ekspresyjna, emocje x2

📍 Warszawa | 2–3 dni zdjęciowe

👉 EPIZODY

K/M 35–50 – naturalni, obserwacyjna komedia (WYSTARCZY WIZYTÓWKA)

📅 DO KIEDY ZGŁOSZENIA?!

• zgłoszenia: do 22.03 (do północy)

• recall: 26.03

• zdjęcia: 31.03–1.04 (+ możliwy 3 dzień)

🍓GDZIE WYSYŁAMY?

tytuł maila : 006

adres: CASTING@UNAGIMEDIA.PL

🎥 CO NAGRAĆ?

• wizytówka ( koniecznie dodaj coś od siebie, opowiedz w 2/3 zdaniach, pokaż profile oraz dłonie!) + zdjęcie portretowe (wyraźne) oraz sylwetki

• scena (wg opisu dla roli - szukaj na końcu ogłoszenia)

• epizody – tylko wizytówka

SKONTAKTUJEMY SIĘ Z WYBRANYMI OSOBAMI!

Dajcie czadu! :)))) ❤️‍🔥

🎥SCENY DO GŁÓWNYCH POSTACI:

👉 SCENA DLA DZIEWCZYN

📍 Szkolna czytelnia

Chłopak siedzi nad książką.

Dziewczyna podchodzi:

„Muszę ci coś powiedzieć…”

On powoli podnosi głowę… i odpływa.

Za bardzo. Za romantycznie.

Dziewczyna pstryka palcami przed jego twarzą.

Wracaj na ziemię 😅

On wraca.

Ona, lekko skrępowana:

„Wiadomość od Rudego.

O 15 widzimy się w Maku.”

Wskazuje na okno.

👉 SCENA DLA CHŁOPAKÓW

📍 Stolik, napięcie jak przed wielkim wyznaniem

Chłopak siedzi.

Nerwowo miętosi chusteczkę.

Czeka. Stres wisi w powietrzu.

Dosadza się reszta.

Cisza.

Wszyscy patrzą.

On przełyka ślinę i w końcu:

„Polubiłem jej zdjęcie z 2018.”

…cisza.

Spojrzenia.

I nagle – wybuch śmiechu 😂

Każdy reaguje po swojemu.

Dziewczyna przytula go:

„Masz moje frytki. Dzisiaj ja stawiam.”

PAMIĘTAJCIE:

✨ Szukamy prawdy, nie przerysowania

✨ Reakcja > tekst

✨ Subtelność robi robotę

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — ATLANTA 🎬
Project Title: Glass Crown: The Repass
Type: Narrative Short Film (Festival Submission)
Location: Atlanta, GA
Shoot Dates: Shoot Dates: Mid May – Early June (exact dates TBD based on cast availability)
Compensation: Unpaid (IMDb credit, footage for reel, meals provided)
PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
A powerful, character-driven short film centered on family, status, and survival.
Set during a tense repast, long-buried dynamics erupt into a moment that changes everything.
This piece will be submitted to film festivals, including the Atlanta Film Festival.
CASTING ROLES:
SIENNA (Lead, Black, early 30s)
Poised, controlled, commanding. A woman who has built herself from nothing—now forced to face the family she left behind.
CAIRO (Lead, Black, early–mid 30s)
Quietly dominant. Protective, grounded, dangerous when pushed. Speaks less, carries more.
COCO (Supporting, Black, 40s–50s)
Warm but sharp. A protector, a second mother figure. Sees everything.
JONATHAN (Supporting, Black, 40s–50s)
Unpredictable, volatile, intimidating. Carries the weight of years and bad decisions.
QUAN (Supporting, Black, early 20s)
Young, reckless, trying to prove himself. Emulates the wrong influence.
ATHENA (Supporting, Black, Female, age 6)
Quiet strength. Observant, emotionally intelligent beyond her years.
ARTEMIS (Supporting, Black, Male, age 6)
Confident, expressive, protective of his sister.
DAY PLAYER ROLES (1–3 lines):
• Cousin Denise (30s–40s, sharp, judgmental)
• Older Woman (50s–70s)
• Teen Girl / Teen Boy
• Dope Boy
• Little Cousin (child)
EXTRAS:
Family members, neighbors, background roles for repast + exterior block scene.
TO SUBMIT:
Send to: LadyOnyxx89@gmail.com 
Include:
• Name
• Age
• Headshot (or clear photo)
• Location (Atlanta/local preferred)
• Acting reel (if available, not required)
• What role you are interested in
NOTE:
This is a passion-driven, cinematic project focused on performance, emotion, and storytelling.
Looking for actors who can bring depth, presence, and authenticity to the screen.
Let’s build something powerful. 🎬

items.text:
Hello,

I’m a filmmaker and former UCLA film professor, and I wanted to briefly share an audition party card game created to help actors with their craft.

It’s a card game called **CASTING CALL** - CastingCallTheGame,  Players receive short movie scripts along with acting “adjustments” from a Director, then perform their audition to try to land the role.

It ends up being a mix of improv, cold reading, and responding to direction, which has made it surprisingly popular with actors and theatre students. Hope you like it, and it helps you book that gig! 🤩

items.title: Hello,

items.text:
Hey everyone! My name is Josh Forman, and I am currently working on my Chapman University graduate thesis film, *Pan Dulce*.

We are looking for **extras of all ages** to help fill out a New York City street farmers market set on a studio backlot.

If you are interested, we would love to have you help bring this New York farmers market to life.

Please fill out the **Google Form below** to be considered:

https://forms.gle/Jbk3MfsfrzS7JAWx5

Thank you so much, and we hope to see you there!

GoogleFormLink In Pan Dulce, an old man goes back in time to give his younger self hug. Extras wiLl help us bring a nostalgic and magical world d life! We invite you to join telling this tender and hopeful story. Please Scan the QR code fill out form to sign up.'

items.title: Hey everyone! My name is Josh Forman, and I am currently working on my Chapman University graduate thesis film, *Pan Dulce*.

items.text:
🗣️ REAL PEOPLE CASTING 🥞
Live in Philly? Gen Z? Love to bake + make pancakes? This one’s for you! 🍪

Working with Dig Projects (https://digprojects.com/) to find participants for an upcoming research project (think of it as a cross between marketing and a documentary).

PAID opportunity where we’ll be chatting with real baking enthusiasts about their preferences and everyday lives — it’s not an ad, just internal research featuring authentic voices.

🥐 If you or someone you know might be a good fit, please fill out this quick form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdVyZR6W1W6WXF-TwJi6wAznzhXPHJIkRFOmur-sT707YrdeA/viewform

🧁 Feel free to share with friends, family, neighbors, anyone in the Philadelphia area who isn't afraid to talk about baking (oh yeah, and if you refer someone who gets selected, you get $100!). 

Questions? Hit my comments!

#marketingresearch #strategyinsights #documentaryfilmmaking #casting #philly #philadelphia #realpeople #GenZ #baking

PAID opportunity where we’ll be chatting with real baking enthusiasts about their preferences and everyday lives — it’s not an ad, just internal research featuring authentic voices.

🥐 If you or someone you know might be a good fit, please fill out this quick form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdVyZR6W1W6WXF-TwJi6wAznzhXPHJIkRFOmur-sT707YrdeA/viewform

🧁 Feel free to share with friends, family, neighbors, anyone in the Philadelphia area who isn't afraid to talk about baking (oh yeah, and if you refer someone who gets selected, you get $100!). 

Questions? Hit my comments!

#marketingresearch #strategyinsights #documentaryfilmmaking #casting #philly #philadelphia #realpeople #GenZ #baking

Action! are going filming. 🎬
Our community theatre group is taking the next step, creating original short films so our actors, writers, and creatives can gain real film experience and build showreels.
To do it properly, we need a small filming kit.
So we’ve launched our first Crowdfunder.
If you can spare £5, you’ll be directly helping local performers create something real and giving people opportunities they wouldn’t otherwise have.
Every single contribution moves this forward.
Support us here:

https://crowdfunder.co.uk/actionfilm

If you can’t donate, sharing this helps more than you know.
Thank you for backing local creativity.

items.text:
Casting Call - ‘No Future’ A Student Fiction Short Film
MA Filmmaking Student - 10-15mins.

Shooting mid-end of April in Nottingham and Burton on Trent.

Unpaid but Travel and Catering provided.

We’re seeking talent from Nottingham, Derby, Burton On Trent and surrounding areas for our upcoming fictional short film; "No Future”. Below is a brief outline of the narrative:

SYNOPSIS:

Acknowledging the high rates of unemployment amongst young adults in contemporary Britain, "No Future" (working title) tells the story of a young graduate navigating working life once moving back home to his blue-collar town after university. The film follows the struggles he faces reintegrating with an environment he feels he's outgrown.

Employing traits of British Social Realism, this story serves to highlight the mental and external battles hundreds of thousands of young adults up and down the country grapple with daily.

AVAILABLE ROLES:

Lead - Sam Merkel, Male, 20-25.

Supporting - Mike Merkel, Male, 22-28.

Supporting - John Merkel, Male, 35-60.

Day Players - Charlie and Will, Male, 20-28.

Extras - Factory Workers, Male, 20-28.

If interested, please shoot me a message here on Facebook or via email jacklwright20@gmail.com and I can provide more details, as well as a link to the Backstage Casting Call if preferred. Thank you!

items.text:
“One can’t just shoot anybody on the street!”

 

Sound familiar from recent events in America?

 

It’s actually a line from *Charlie *and *Striptease *a double-bill of hilarious political comedies written in the Soviet era by award-winning Polish writer Slawomir Mrozek.

 

I’m delighted to share that DRH Arts is presenting these hilarious but thought-provoking plays (in English translation) at The Golden Goose Theatre in Camberwell from 21 April to 9 May. The theatre is just down the road from Oval.  

 

The plays, with four actors, expose the world of authoritarian government, secret police, informers and surveillance, through fast-moving comedy and satire. 

 

Full details can be found in the leaflet attached here and on the venue website:

 

[https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease](https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease) 

 

Follow us on Instagram @drh.arts for cast info, production updates and news.

items.text:
# **Casting Call for RED, proof of concept short**

Non-union

Short Film/Proof Of Concept

This is a short excerpt of a longer film used as a proof of concept. The film consists of two scenes that hint at its larger themes. We are only producing the proof of concept as of now. 

Please send an email to **Red.film.2026@gmail.com**, with the subject line being "**Casting Submission - (Insert Character name)**", by **March 19th**. Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke

Writer: Zev Lemke

Producer: Samantha Teasdale

Casting Director: [Jacob Ellis](https://www.facebook.com/jacob.ellis.376695?__cft__[0]=AZboTo04r8L-ADFF47mM3TZop9TEVBanY09bd2p7DbkuE2nuKa8JJahubuiIUMeVdbjPTWfBOKucr8ci3zIGiDx14XRekgNqB6OnYTjBS6lzgRZWeWaE3vUil5DacY7S8Fo&__tn__=-]K-R)

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(10-14ish)

Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits.

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia

**Logline:**

In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing. 

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film.

**CHARACTERS:**

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him. 

Aiden (Supporting, 18-22, Plays 17) - average build. Aiden is extroverted, loud, and magnetic. Beneath her confident, brash exterior is a deep need to be seen and validated, which drives her to chase validation and engagement at all costs. Aiden can be superficial, often prioritizing image over real-life connections. She tends to treat Reid more as a ‘gay best friend’, an accessory, than as a person with his own needs and hesitations. 

Tracy (Supporting, 40s) – Greyish-brown hair, thin. A single mother who works long hours as a nurse, Tracy loves her son deeply but struggles to connect with him on an emotional level. Though she’s accepting of his sexuality and loves him unconditionally, it subtly shapes how she relates to him.  Reid’s self-expression often unsettles her, not due to any judgment, but from an anxiety of how the world might treat him. The mother and son were once close, but Tracy and Reid have drifted apart during his tumultuous teenage years. When Tracey comes home to find Reid on the floor she is terrified for her child.
items.summary:
# **Casting Call for RED, proof of concept short**

Non-union

Short Film/Proof Of Concept

This is a short excerpt of a longer film used as a proof of concept. The film consists of two scenes that hint at its larger themes. We are only producing the proof of concept as of now. 

Please send an email to **Red.film.2026@gmail.com**, with the subject line being "**Casting Submission - (Insert Character name)**", by **March 19th**. Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke

Writer: Zev Lemke

Producer: Samantha Teasdale

Casting Director: [Jacob Ellis](https://www.facebook.com/jacob.ellis.376695?__cft__[0]=AZboTo04r8L-ADFF47mM3TZop9TEVBanY09bd2p7DbkuE2nuKa8JJahubuiIUMeVdbjPTWfBOKucr8ci3zIGiDx14XRekgNqB6OnYTjBS6lzgRZWeWaE3vUil5DacY7S8Fo&__tn__=-]K-R)

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(10-14ish)

Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits.

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia

**Logline:**

In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing. 

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film.

**CHARACTERS:**

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him. 

Aiden (Supporting, 18-22, Plays 17) - average build. Aiden is extroverted, loud, and magnetic. Beneath her confident, brash exterior is a deep need to be seen and validated, which drives her to chase validation and engagement at all costs. Aiden can be superficial, often prioritizing image over real-life connections. She tends to treat Reid more as a ‘gay best friend’, an accessory, than as a person with his own needs and hesitations. 

Tracy (Supporting, 40s) – Greyish-brown hair, thin. A single mother who works long hours as a nurse, Tracy loves her son deeply but struggles to connect with him on an emotional level. Though she’s accepting of his sexuality and loves him unconditionally, it subtly shapes how she relates to him.  Reid’s self-expression often unsettles her, not due to any judgment, but from an anxiety of how the world might treat him. The mother and son were once close, but Tracy and Reid have drifted apart during his tumultuous teenage years. When Tracey comes home to find Reid on the floor she is terrified for her child.

MISS TOSH PRESENTS: THE BEAUTY OF BURLESQUE

📍 Globe Theatre, Downtown Los Angeles

📅 Performance Date: Thursday, March 19

We are seeking a strong male-presenting dancer/performer to join our ensemble cast for an upcoming show this Thursday.

ABOUT THE SHOW:

A high-glamour, immersive burlesque and variety experience featuring dance, aerial, circus, and theatrical storytelling. This is a luxury, fashion-forward production with an emphasis on stage presence, charisma, and elevated performance quality.

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

Confident male dancer with strong stage presence

Experience in jazz, heels, commercial, burlesque, or theatrical performance

Comfortable performing in a sensual, stylized environment

Reliable, professional, and quick to pick up choreography

Partnering experience is a plus

🗣️ REAL PEOPLE CASTING 🥞
Live in Philly? Gen Z? Love to bake + make pancakes? This one’s for you! 🍪

Working with Dig Projects (https://digprojects.com/) to find participants for an upcoming research project (think of it as a cross between marketing and a documentary).

PAID opportunity where we’ll be chatting with real baking enthusiasts about their preferences and everyday lives — it’s not an ad, just internal research featuring authentic voices.

🥐 If you or someone you know might be a good fit, please fill out this quick form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdVyZR6W1W6WXF-TwJi6wAznzhXPHJIkRFOmur-sT707YrdeA/viewform

🧁 Feel free to share with friends, family, neighbors, anyone in the Philadelphia area who isn't afraid to talk about baking (oh yeah, and if you refer someone who gets selected, you get $100!). 

Questions? Hit my comments!

Vicky Boone Casting is looking for real Construction Workers who are men, real Vehicle Drivers who are women, and real teenage Skateboarders for principal roles in a QT commercial! Details below:

Project: QuickTrip
NON-UNION
Casting Director: Vicky Boone, Chantel Italia
Audition date: Self tapes due 3/23
Callback Date: March 26, 2026 - virtual
Wardrobe Date: March 30, 2026
Shoot Dates: March 31 - April 3, 2026 (will work 1 day)
Rate of Pay: $750 +20%(session), $3000 + 20%(use), $100 +20%(fitting)
Location: Austin, TX. Must work local hire to ATX
Usage: Video and Print. All Media (all moving media + all print media). North America (US + CANADA + MEXICO). Exclusivity for C-Stores + QSRs 1 Year from first airdate.

—
WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

[REAL CONSTRUCTION WORKERS] 20-55 year old male, any ethnicity. Genuine and natural, not polished. Should feel like a friend, co-worker or neighbor. Expressive with a confident and grounded presence. Real construction workers or "blue-collar" workers encouraged to submit. OCP.

[REAL WOMEN WHO DRIVE FOR A LIVING] 25-45 year old woman, any ethnicity. Should be genuine and natural, not polished or “model-like.” Should feel like a friend, co-worker or neighbor. Expressive with a confident and grounded presence. Women who really drive for UPS, AMAZON, etc or other "blue-collar" workers encouraged to submit. OCP.

[SKATERS] 15-19 years old, male or female, any ethnicity. Must be a strong skateboarder. Genuine and natural, not polished or “model-like.” OCP.

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:
*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned (3/26, 3/30-4/3) or list conflicts
*FOR SKATER ONLY - Tell us a bit about your skateboarding experience.
*Please use the subject line "CONSTRUCTION WORKER" or "FEMALE DRIVER" or "SKATER" depending on which role you are submitting for.

We look forward to your submissions!
Team VBC

Independent horror feature filming in Atlanta, GA is seeking a female lead - ASAP.

ROLE: MARY  
Female, early–mid 30s, thin build, height approx. 5’3”–5’6”.  
Seeking talent with light brown to medium brown skin tone and dark brunette to medium brown hair.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – NATURALISTIC LIFESTYLE VIGNETTES**
We’re casting 4 individuals for a series of short, realistic lifestyle video vignettes. These are simple, observational moments (no dialogue) that capture everyday behaviors like shopping, dining, commuting, and using your phone.

**PROJECT DETAILS**
* Shoot type: Natural, documentary-style video (no scripted lines)
* Locations: Retail store, restaurant, self-driving taxi ride, outdoor public space
* Shoot duration: ~2-3 hours per person
* Shoot dates: March 19th or March 20th (flexible scheduling)
* Small, lightweight 1-person crew (run-and-gun style)

**ROLES**
Looking for 4 individuals (one per vignette), ages 26–60:
* Any gender, any ethnicity
* Must be comfortable on camera and aware of how you come across visually
* Should feel natural and grounded, not overly theatrical
* Real, relatable everyday presence

**SCENARIOS INCLUDE**
* Shopping in a store (e.g. browsing and purchasing a product)
* Riding in a self-driving car
* Dining at a fast-casual restaurant
* Using your phone in a park or outdoor setting

**WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR**
* Strong on-camera presence without overacting
* Ability to take light direction and adjust behavior naturally
* Comfortable being filmed in public environments
* Subtle, believable expressions and reactions

**IMPORTANT NOTES**
* No dialogue or memorization required
* Minimal crew and equipment to keep things low-profile
* Some filming will take place in real public locations
* Wardrobe should be casual, everyday clothing (no logos preferred)

**COMPENSATION**
* Paid (please include your half-day rate)

**TO SUBMIT**
Please send to benjamin@joinpogo.com:
* Name, age, and location
* 2–3 recent photos (no heavy filters)
* Short presecreen video REQUIRED: Film yourself sitting at a dining table, scrolling on phone, selecting something off a shelf (can be at home), and sitting in the car as if riding. Also include several examples of corporate videos you’ve been in, or if none, just any videos you’ve acted in.

Thank you!

items.text:
**GENERAL AUDITIONS – The Bronx, NY**

Are you an actor with a passion for history? Come join us for an upcoming Live History performance in The Bronx, New York. We’re seeking local actors for a theatrical experience.

Interested? Read our casting call below!

Live History is an international theater company that specializes in interactive, site-specific performances in historic buildings, often incorporating elements of an escape room–style experience. 

This particular production features a **historical/classic script originally written in the 1700s**. Actors should be comfortable working with period language and classical text.

**Role Available: UNDERSTUDY**

**Age: 21+**

**Gender: Any**

We are casting the role of **UNDERSTUDY**.

The Understudy will:
* Cover up to **five (5) roles** in the show.
* Read for absent actors during rehearsals.
* Be prepared to move into any assigned role in the event of illness on the day of the performance.
* Potentially be used as a silent on-stage character during the show, if desired.

This is an excellent opportunity for a versatile and prepared performer who is comfortable tracking multiple roles and stepping in with confidence.

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid **$200 total as an honorarium **for one performance and all online/Zoom rehearsals.

**Show Date**

**March 22, 2026**
IN PERSON – Bronx, NY
**Rehearsals**

Rehearsals will take place primarily over Zoom with the last few in person:
* Zoom rehearsals are **one hour each**, held **3–4 times per week**.
* Most rehearsals occur during **daytime hours**.
* Some exceptions for existing conflicts may be accommodated, provided the actor can attend the majority of rehearsals.
**MANDATORY ZOOM Dress Rehearsal**

March 20 (Friday) | 7:00–9:00 PM EST
**MANDATORY IN-PERSON Dress Rehearsals**

March 21
March 22 (prior to the 2:00 PM showtime)

items.summary:
**GENERAL AUDITIONS – The Bronx, NY**

Are you an actor with a passion for history? Come join us for an upcoming Live History performance in The Bronx, New York. We’re seeking local actors for a theatrical experience.

Interested? Read our casting call below!

Live History is an international theater company that specializes in interactive, site-specific performances in historic buildings, often incorporating elements of an escape room–style experience. 

This particular production features a **historical/classic script originally written in the 1700s**. Actors should be comfortable working with period language and classical text.

**Role Available: UNDERSTUDY**

**Age: 21+**

**Gender: Any**

We are casting the role of **UNDERSTUDY**.

The Understudy will:
* Cover up to **five (5) roles** in the show.
* Read for absent actors during rehearsals.
* Be prepared to move into any assigned role in the event of illness on the day of the performance.
* Potentially be used as a silent on-stage character during the show, if desired.

This is an excellent opportunity for a versatile and prepared performer who is comfortable tracking multiple roles and stepping in with confidence.

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid **$200 total as an honorarium **for one performance and all online/Zoom rehearsals.

**Show Date**

**March 22, 2026**
IN PERSON – Bronx, NY
**Rehearsals**

Rehearsals will take place primarily over Zoom with the last few in person:
* Zoom rehearsals are **one hour each**, held **3–4 times per week**.
* Most rehearsals occur during **daytime hours**.
* Some exceptions for existing conflicts may be accommodated, provided the actor can attend the majority of rehearsals.
**MANDATORY ZOOM Dress Rehearsal**

March 20 (Friday) | 7:00–9:00 PM EST
**MANDATORY IN-PERSON Dress Rehearsals**

March 21
March 22 (prior to the 2:00 PM showtime)

Attendance at all dress rehearsals  and in person show is required.

**Auditions**

Auditions will be held virtually (via Zoom) on:

Wednesday, March 4th | 1:00 PM – 6:00 PM EST

Auditions will consist of a scripted cold read.

**To Request an Audition**

Please submit a resume and headshot to:
[livehistoryusa@gmail.com](https://)

Subject line:
**THE BRONX AUDITIONS**

Actors must be 21+ and have a professional resume and headshot to be considered.

For more information, visit:
[www.livehistoryshows.com](https://www.livehistoryshows.com)

🎬 CAST & CREW CALL – “Late, But Alive”

We’re currently working on an independent short film in Germany and looking for passionate, creative individuals to join the project.

This is an unpaid opportunity, but a real chance to:

• Gain on-set experience

• Build a strong portfolio

• Receive IMDb credit

• Be part of a meaningful cinematic story

We’re looking for:

• Actors

• Assistant Director

• Cinematographer

• Sound Designer

If you’re serious about filmmaking and want to grow, this is your chance.

📩 Send your portfolio or info to:

harounarrah@icloud.com

Let’s create something real.

⸻

🇩🇪 GERMAN CAPTION

🎬 CAST & CREW GESUCH – „Late, But Alive“

Wir arbeiten aktuell an einem unabhängigen Kurzfilm in Deutschland und suchen motivierte und kreative Menschen, die Teil des Projekts werden möchten.

Dies ist eine unbezahlte Gelegenheit, aber eine echte Chance, um:

• praktische Erfahrung am Set zu sammeln

• dein Portfolio aufzubauen

• einen IMDb Credit zu erhalten

• Teil einer bedeutungsvollen Filmproduktion zu sein

Gesucht werden:

• Schauspieler:innen

• Regieassistenz

• Kameramann/-frau (DoP)

• Sound Designer

Wenn du ernsthaft im Filmbereich wachsen willst, bist du hier richtig.

harounarrah@icloud.com

Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 12/2026

AND THE OSCAR GOES TO....

Wir präsentieren die Highlights der diesjährigen Verleihung des Academy Awards. 

Abseits des wichtigsten Filmpreises starten äußerst interessante Neuerscheinungen. Erleben Sie Ryan Gosling in DER ASTRONAUT,  den vielleicht besten SciFy Film seit Kubriks 2001 oder das Regiedebüt von Kirsten Stewart (THE CHRONOLOGY OF WATER).

Animationstechnisch präsentieren wir eine ziemlich turbulente Zugfahrt in TIERISCH ABGEFAHREN.

Abgerundet wird die Sendung im Oscarmonat März mit Awardwinnern best Song and best Score der letzten 90 Jahre sowie Songs aus den aktuellen Filmen.

Mittwoch 18.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

•£30, same day pay - this is not the payment I’ve set it’s what the team told me their budget is, I’ve tried to increase it already

•central LEEDS - must be ok getting there as no extra travel can be provided

items.text:
POTNIA THERON de Hélia Correia

DIA MUNDIAL DO TEATRO

27 MARÇO
Sexta- feira às 21h30

CINE-TEATRO SÃO JOÃO, PALMELA

info e reservas
Bilheteira do Cine-Teatro São João e em BOL.PT:
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/173353-potnia_theron-cine_teatro_s_joao/

POTNIA THERON do grego antigo “Senhora dos animais” é um motivo artístico milenar que descreve a divindade feminina com domínio absoluto sobre a natureza selvagem. O termo aparece pela primeira vez na Ilíada de Homero, para descrever a deusa Ártemis, sendo, no entanto, um conceito muito mais antigo, com raízes em divindades femininas da Idade do Bronze e até do Neolítico.
Hélia Correia escritora consagrada, escreve de um fôlego, este poema épico inédito, a partir da antiguidade clássica, para o espectáculo que Maria João Luís encena como uma opereta não convencional, abordando e reflectindo sobre as relações de forças entre os géneros masculino e feminino.

​com
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS, SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO, ANTÓNIO LOURENÇO MENEZES

cenografia JOSÉ MANUEL CASTANHEIRA
música original JOSÉ PEIXOTO
desenho de luz, fotografia PEDRO DOMINGOS
encenação MARIA JOÃO LUÍS

assistência de encenação BEATRIZ VIEIRA DE CARVALHO
assistência de produção FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção TEATRO da TERRA 2026 | M/12

parceria
Municipio do Seixal 

Apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, juventude, desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

Ένα βιωματικό σεμινάριο θεάτρου βασισμένο στο σπουδαίο έργο «Βάκχες», όπου θα δουλέψουμε:

items.text:
LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

Taught by professionals working in the industry - JUST £20

I hope this is OK to post here.

VRASP is coming to London and we are SO ready for you.

Starting Wednesday 29th April, our weekly drop in screen acting class lands back in Brixton (Brixton Road Youth Centre, 143-145 Brixton Road, London, SW9 6LZ).

Whether you are completely new to acting or a seasoned performer ready to level up, this class is for you. All abilities welcome, ages 18 and over. No commitment, just book online and show up.

At VRASP you are taught by working industry professionals, including founder Verona Rose, actress, writer, and presenter with credits including Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush to name a few.

As a VRASP student you can access:

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training.
 
VIP networking events with industry insiders 

Red carpet and industry events alongside Verona and the VRASP community 

The opportunity to join the VRASP talent agency as a natural next step in your career

Every Wednesday from 29th April 7pm to 9pm Brixton Road Youth Centre, London Just £20 per session

Book at www.vrasp.co.uk or drop us a message if you have any questions.

items.summary:
LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

Taught by professionals working in the industry - JUST £20

I hope this is OK to post here.

VRASP is coming to London and we are SO ready for you.

Starting Wednesday 29th April, our weekly drop in screen acting class lands back in Brixton (Brixton Road Youth Centre, 143-145 Brixton Road, London, SW9 6LZ).

Whether you are completely new to acting or a seasoned performer ready to level up, this class is for you. All abilities welcome, ages 18 and over. No commitment, just book online and show up.

At VRASP you are taught by working industry professionals, including founder Verona Rose, actress, writer, and presenter with credits including Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush to name a few.

As a VRASP student you can access:

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training.
 
VIP networking events with industry insiders 

Red carpet and industry events alongside Verona and the VRASP community 

The opportunity to join the VRASP talent agency as a natural next step in your career

Every Wednesday from 29th April 7pm to 9pm Brixton Road Youth Centre, London Just £20 per session

Book at www.vrasp.co.uk or drop us a message if you have any questions.
items.title: LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

items.text:
**CALLING FILMMAKERS & CREATIVES** 🎬

I’m looking to collaborate with talented people in film for **both paid and unpaid opportunities** as we continue building and expanding our productions.

We’re currently open to connecting with:
• **Producers**
• **Directors**
• **Camera Crew**
• **Lighting Crew**
• **Sound / Audio**
• **Make Up Artists**
• **Anyone working in film who wants to collaborate**

We already have a solid team in place, but we’re **always open to expanding our network** and working with passionate creatives. Some projects are **paid**, while others are **collaborative as we raise funds for bigger productions**.

If you’re interested in **building, creating, and growing together**, feel free to **inbox me** and let’s talk.

🎥 Let’s make something great.

items.text:
CASTING CALL ‼️

Project: Short film
Title: Remember Me?
Location: Manchester
Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026

Please note that this is an unpaid collab project however food & travel expenses will be covered.

Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require to be on set for the full two days.

How to apply:
Please send an email to
RMfilmproduction@outlook.com including your name, headshot and/or showreel and which character you're interested in applying for :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Short Film Location: Manchester Shoot dates: 25th & 26th April 2026 Majority of the characters only have a few lines, therefore wouldn't require on set for the full two days. be Afew A few characters who dont appear in the same scene at once could be potentially played by one person. Please note that this is an unpaid collab project however food and travel expenses will be covered.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'About: 'Remember Me?' is a short 5 5-6 minute satirical comedy that plays with the illogical tropes and stereotypes found in action films, such as overly exaggerated characters questionable disguises, and the way they are portrayed on screen. fast-paced comedy set almost entirely in one flat that begins like a tense, high-stakes thriller but spirals into completely silly chaos. It's a self aware, character driven comedy that gives actors the opportunity to explore meta humor and heightened personalities, all while lightly poking fun at the conventions of the action genre.'
May be an illustration of text
May be an image of text

May be a graphic of text that says 'Characters The Woman: 6 lines We all know the "Innocent" character returning home, who is slightly weary from life's everyday struggles. Jaymee is someone who gives off a sense of vulnerability which makes her seem like the typical victim when she's confronted. However, just like in some beloved action flicks, the main character turns out to be the mastermind In this case, Jaymee is only really recognized once she removes her wig, revealing she's several steps ahead of everyone around her.'

items.text:
**WROCŁAW**

Hej! Szukamy modelki do wydarzenia modowego, które odbędzie się **30 maja o godzinie 18:00 w Muzeum Teatru we Wrocławiu**.

MycoMorph to performatywne wydarzenie modowe, które łączy organiczne formy z elementami technologii. Autorką kolekcji jest Alicja Rzeźnik, projektantka ubioru i kostiumografka, która w tym roku kończy edukację na kierunku Scenografii na Akademii Sztuk Pięknych im. Eugeniusza Gepperta we Wrocławiu.

Wydarzenie jest częścią projektu dyplomowego, a udział w nim jest nieodpłatny

Z przyjemnością odpowiemy na wszystkie pytania i opowiemy więcej o projekcie.

**Wymagania:**
* rozmiar 36/38

**Zgłoszenia powinny zawierać:**
* informacje o wzroście, wymiarach w talii, klatce piersiowej, ramionach i biodrach, a także rozmiar buta
* informację o mieście zamieszkania
* aktualną fotografię (lub kilka)

**Zgłoszenia oraz ewentualne pytania prosimy kierować pod adres: ****[mycomorphcollection@gmail.com](mailto:mycomorphcollection@gmail.com)**** **

Fotografia: Mikołaj Kabata

Modelka: Paulina Krasińska

items.text:
NAGRAJ SWOJE DEMO W Z MIŁOŚCI DO
Podczas spotkania pracujemy nad materiałem, który może stać się Twoją wizytówką w branży. Demo wykorzystasz przy zgłoszeniach do studiów dubbingowych i lektorskich, w kontaktach z pracodawcami oraz w autoprezentacji do pracy z głosem.

Sesja trwa około godziny i obejmuje nagranie:
* fragmentu prozy
* fragmentu bajki z różnymi postaciami
* reklamy komercyjnej
* wizytówki głosowej

Gotowe materiały przekazujemy zarówno w formie zmontowanej, jak i surowej do samodzielnej obróbki.

Aktualny cennik dostępny jest na stronie [www.zmiloscido.pl](http://www.zmiloscido.pl/)

Zapisy: [www.zmiloscido.pl/kontakt](http://www.zmiloscido.pl/kontakt)

[TO NIE JEST OFERTA PRACY A USŁUGA]

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – TikTok / Facebook Video Presenter (Manchester)

We’re looking for confident, natural on-camera presenters / actors to feature in short-form, social media-style videos, filmed on set in Manchester.

This is not traditional acting — we want people who feel comfortable talking directly to camera in a TikTok / Facebook Reels style. Think engaging, relatable, confident, and modern.

🔹 The Role

Present short, punchy scripts straight to camera

TikTok / Facebook-style delivery (15–60 seconds)

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect

Example: https://vimeo.com/1119845100/ea1fd86ea4?fl=ip&fe=ec

 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

items.text:
Hi everyone,

I hope you are all enjoying the lovely sunny weather! We are looking for someone to play Patrick in a  short film project made by students from the City Academy Foundation Filmmaking course. The film is about a woman pretending to be a medium in order to con a wealthy widow out of their inheritance. However their plan is foiled when it turns out that she actually has the ability to speak with the dead...

Shooting for this role will take place in Central London this Friday (March 20th) from 18:30-21:00) and Friday 10th April at the same time.

Unfortunately as it is a student film and we have no budget  it is unpaid. I'm really sorry about this. All talent will be provided a download of the film once complete. References can also be provided once shooting is complete.

Patrick is in his 70s. He's an eccentric aristocrat with a big sense of humour. He is also dead...

Please email marie-elena.nash@outlook.com for further info.

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat do roli Eli**

Szukamy skarbu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat młodo wyglądającej do roli Eli najlepiej mieszkającej w Gliwicach lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice najdalej ) Postać będzie mieć dialogi po polsku. Szukamy osób bez farbowanych włosów czy malowanych paznokciach oraz kolczyków jakichkolwiek na twarzy.

 

Młoda 20 letnia** **dziewczyna. Wysoka i szczupła o długich włosach. W czasie okupacji niemieckiej razem z Stefanem i Wandą uczestniczą w kilku akcjach patriotycznych ,które na celu mają m.in. klejenie na murach plakatów. Podczas jednej z akcji ratuje Wandę i Stefana przed śmiercią z ręki niemieckiego żołnierza strzelając do niego z broni ojca wcześniej pożyczonej. Podkochuje się w Stefanie ale nie mówi mi tego na początku.

** **

Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of one or more people, bangs and text that says '"Grupa "Grupa 1940" Oryginalne materiały 2025'

items.text:
Stwórzmy razem coś, czego w polskim internecie jeszcze nie było, czyli przestrzeń, w której różnice nie dzielą, a uczą 🤝

Tworzymy nowy format debat i szukamy właśnie Ciebie

Chcemy stworzyć miejsce, w którym można się naprawdę usłyszeć

Bez krzyków, bez przerywania, bez udawania, że tylko jedna strona ma rację. Wierzymy, że nawet przy skrajnie różnych poglądach można rozmawiać z szacunkiem

To nie będzie kolejna internetowa kłótnia

To będzie rozmowa, w której liczy się odwaga, otwartość mózgu i umiejętność słuchania
* Nie szukamy osób, które ze wszystkim się zgadzają
* Nie szukamy też tych, którzy chcą tylko "wygrać”
* Zależy nam na autentyczności, a nie "zagranej" roli

Szukamy ludzi, którzy:
* mają własne zdanie
* potrafią je obronić, ale też wysłuchać drugiej strony
* chcą budować, a nie niszczyć

Jeśli chcesz zmierzyć się w rozmowie z kimś o zupełnie innych poglądach, w atmosferze szacunku i bezpieczeństwa - to miejsce dla Ciebie

Zgłoś się do nas, chętnym osobom prześlemy krótką ankietę do wypełnienia

Poprosimy też o krótkie nagranie, w którym odpowiesz na jedno z pytań

Projekt jest płatny 💸

Po więcej szczegółów zapraszam na priv lub pod adresem: wiktoria.casting@gmail.com

We are looking for 3 actors, a man around 40 years old, who are native speakers of Spanish, Portuguese, or Italian, with clear, fluent speech and no noticeable accent.

Details:

• Fee: $2600

• Location: Thailand

• 1 shooting day

• Own wardrobe required

• The footage cannot be used in a personal portfolio

• Shooting dates: March

• Flights will be covered by the production

To apply, please send your photos.

Selected candidates will be asked to record and submit a video test. We look forward to your applications ✨

items.text:
🎬 CASTING NOTICE – STUDENT SHORT FILM

Title: Incoherent
Project Type: Junior Thesis Project – Loyola Marymount University
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Director: Royce Haddock
Producers: Ava Correia, Walter Bridgewater
Shoot Dates: 3-Day Shoot (Friday,  March 20 / Saturday, March 21/ Sunday, March 22)
Location: Los Angeles/ Ladera Heights, CA
Compensation: $100/day (3 days total) + Meals & Credit

🎥 PROJECT OVERVIEW
Incoherent is a psychological thriller/drama centered on grief, memory, and the fractured relationship between a father and his daughter.
Abel, a grieving father, is trapped in a recurring nightmare that forces him to relive the day he lost one of his daughters. On the eve of the 10-year anniversary, the nightmare changes—he can no longer wake up. As he searches for answers within this psychological loop, a real-life emergency unfolds, putting his surviving daughter in danger.
At its core, this is a story about a man learning how to live again after unimaginable loss—and a father and daughter struggling to reconnect after years of emotional distance.

🎭 CASTING ROLE
ABEL (Lead)
Gender: Male
Ethnicity: Black / African American
Age Range: Late 30s – 40s
Role Type: Lead
Shoot Requirement: Must be available all 3 shoot days
Character Description:
Selfless, steadfast, and emotionally guarded. Abel is a devoted single father who once had two daughters, but after the tragic loss of one at a young age, he has become emotionally withdrawn.
Ten years later, he remains psychologically stuck in that moment—avoiding anything that reminds him of the loss. His unresolved grief prevents him from being fully present in the life of his surviving daughter, now 18, creating a quiet but painful emotional distance between them.
Throughout the film, Abel is forced to confront the truth he’s been running from, making this role heavily performance-driven with strong emotional depth.
Additional Notes:
Facial hair preferred
Must be comfortable portraying intense emotional scenes (grief, distress, vulnerability)
Strong dramatic acting ability required

📩 SUBMISSION DETAILS
Headshot • Resume • Demo Reel (if available)
Must confirm availability for all shoot dates
Submit To: IncoherentShortFilm@gmail.com
Subject Line: INCOHERENT – ABEL SUBMISSION – [Your Name]

items.text:
**“MAX” CASTING CALL – SASKIA**

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of SASKIA in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE “SASKIA” FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

21 – 30 years old.

Female-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Wednesday 18th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Sunday 22nd March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.

Diese Woche Donnerstag,📅19.03.2026, ab⏰16 Uhr vor Ort: Jetzt anmelden und Deinen Platz sichern.

Infos zu unserem Bildungsangebot: [https://wave-akademie.de/](https://wave-akademie.de/)

Erfahre alles über die Ausbildung 3D Artist (staatlich anerkannt) & 3D Designer. Erfahre alles über die Ausbildung, Chancen & Perspektiven, in welchen Branchen Du arbeiten kannst und was genau Du für den Start ins Sommersemester am 07.04.2026 benötigst.

Wir beraten Dich gern und finden mit Dir gemeinsam den richtigen Weg in 3D Design, Games, Interior Design und Architektur.

🎬 CASTING CALL 

Für unseren Kurzfilm suchen wir eine Darstellerin für die Rolle:

LINA (25–30)
Warmherzig, emotional und authentisch. Lina liebt tief, steht aber innerlich zwischen Hoffnung und Schmerz.

📍 Drehort: Stuttgart
📅 Dreh: 17.–18.04
🎥 Produktion: TT Films
💰 Gage: Keine (Hobbyprojekt), aber Material für dein Showreel & Verpflegung am Set.

📩 Bei Interesse: kurze Vorstellung + 2–3 Fotos senden.

items.text:
🎬 UPGRADE YOUR SHOWREEL: Cinematic Scenes for Actors
Struggling to get that "Pro" look with your showreel? We are filmmakers looking to collaborate with dedicated actors to create high-end, bespoke showreel scenes.

We shoot on the Sony A7iii with Sirui Nightwalker cine lenses (T1.2) to give you that shallow depth-of-field and "big screen" bokeh you see on Netflix Whether you need a gritty East London crime drama, a subtle True Detective noir, or a high-stakes CEO monologue, we handle the lighting, sound, and edit to make you look like a lead.

What we offer:

• Custom Scripts: Written specifically for your casting type.

• Professional Scenes: Shot to look like a film or TV. We offer a wealth of experience having made feature films from 10+ years in the business.

• 4K Film & Colour: Cinematic "Film Look" included.

• Fast Turnaround: Get your clips ready for Spotlight/Mandy.

• Professional Actors: We offer a professional actor to act opposite you inna scene to make it stand out even more.

📍 Based in London/Essex. Check out our latest scenes below! 👇

https://www.instagram.com/sticksreels/

topComments.text: To actors reading this post, rest assured, producers, directors and casting directors look at the experience, skills and abilities of your acting itself, the quality of the visuals, isn't a player like this post implies..... Just write a cool short scene, smartphone and film and edit yourself........ Easy.....

items.text:
Casting film krótkometrażowy „PRÓG” projekt festiwalowy

Szukam dwóch aktorów do klimatycznego, onirycznego filmu o czasie, decyzjach i momentach, które przychodzą za późno.

To historia oparta na napięciu, spojrzeniach i atmosferze, bardziej odczuwalna niż opowiedziana.

MARCIN (20-30)
Charyzmatyczny, pewny siebie, z nutą kokieterii. Umie grać obecnością. 

MIŁOSZ (20-30)
Otwarty, żywy, swobodny. Naturalna energia, poczucie luzu. 

☎️ Zdjęcia: 29 marca, Warszawa
💡 1 dzień zdjęciowy
🕯️ Projekt non-profit

❗️ Świetna okazja do pracy na zaangażowanym, profesjonalnie prowadzonym planie i zdobycia doświadczenia przed kamerą

‼️ Kameralna ekipa, skupienie na atmosferze i pracy z aktorem

Jeśli czujesz ten klimat, wyślij kilka słów o sobie + zdjęcia / materiały.

items.text:
Serdecznie zapraszamy!🎬

Role do obsadzenia!

Zetki 19-30 lat
▪️Milleniallsi 30-45 lat (w czym kasjerka lub kasjer)
▪️Rodzice 45-60 lat 
▪️Seniorzy 60-75 lat 

Chętnie zobaczymy osoby o cechach charakterystycznych:
dziewczyna z diastemą, chłopak z piegami albo wielkim nosem, seniorka z kolorowymi włosami, mężczyzna w typie architekta, wujek z wąsem czy ciotka z trwałą, osoby plus size itp.

UWAGA! ⛔️
Wszystkie filmy nagrywajcie w poziomie, przy dziennym lub jasnym świetle. 

Proszę o zgłoszenia na adres mailowy- plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule proszę wpisać rolę do której się Państwo zgłaszacie. W zgłoszeniu proszę umieścić imię, nazwisko wiek tel, wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki oraz wizytówkę.

Wybranym osobom wyślę link do zgłoszeń, scenkę do odegrania oraz kartę castingową.

Serdecznie Zapraszam do zgłoszeń!
Marta 🎥 Film-Akcja♥️🎬

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting do Supermarketu! Poszukiwane osoby 0 poczuciu rytmu i swobodzie w ciele. Poszukujemy 6 osób w przedziale wiekowym 20-75 lat. Zgloszenia 22.03 Recall 24.03 Przymiarkii próby 25.03 Zdjęcia nocne 26.03 Stawki: Dzień zdjęciowy/ 1500 Prawa 5000 Próby choreo 750 Zgłoś się: plan@filmakcja.pl'

items.text:
**Little Flix London Film Festival is proud to announce our very first festival, supported by the BFI Inclusion Team.**

27 June 2026
BFI Stephen Street

Little Flix London Film Festival was created to provide a powerful platform for global majority and working-class filmmakers whose stories deserve visibility, opportunity, and investment.

We are seeking micro scripts between one and seven minutes long.

https://filmfreeway.com/LITTLEFLIXLONDONFilmFestival

https://Www.littleflixlondonfilmfestival.com

Info@littleflixlondonfilmfestival.com

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'WIN AWARDS FOR YOUR MICRO -SHORT SCRIPTS AT THE BFI JUNE 27TH 館 MARA LITTLEFLIX FLIX LITTLE LONDON FILMEESTIVAI FILMI Submit your micro-short short script now! All scripts will be read and reviewed by industry professionals. The winning screenwriter will be invited to the BFI to receive their award.'

items.text:
🎬 Actor Casting Call｜Student Project MV
Hi Everyone! We are Degree in Broadcasting students from TARUMT. Currently looking for actors for our upcoming music video project. This music video explores love, memory, and loss and grief. Full of emotions story telling. 

📍 Film Details

Student Project Music Video 

Genre:  Emotional Romance 

Filming Dates: 30 March – 1 April 2026 (3 full days)

Open to talents based in Selangor or Kuala Lumpur

Meal and Accommodations provided !

🌟 If interested please send us:

1. Your name, age, height

2. Recent photos (front & profile)

3. Any acting reels or past work (if available)

📩

Drop us a message and contact through - 

Yi Xuan  + 60186654840

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'MUSIC VIDEO CASTING CALL Student Project from TARUMT Meal, Transport, Accommodate provided Apea.| preferences Neat Dark tone Simple Japanese Style 168cm -178cm Prefer talent based Selamgor KL Personality Shy, Quiet but shows in actions. 30 March April 2026 full days) Male Protagonist Able Acting requires Happiness, Crying, Silence Pain, portray emotions facially Requires hands Aearance preferences and friendly, Big smile Style Advantages slight japanese Personality Bubbly, extroverted. observant, kind and caring. Require Acting Able have both contrast both happy and sad emotions, laugh and Able portray emotions facially Protagonist Yi Xuan Kindly drop Interested? +60186654840 message Casting Call MV'

May be an image of text that says 'MV MV演员招募 TARUMT学生影视作品 TARUMT 学生影视作品 工 包括 膳食，交通,住宿 长相要求 整洁简单干净 深色发色 3日系 4身高： 4身高：168cm-178cm 168cm-178cm -178cm 168cm 雪兰我/吉隆坡 吉隆坡 雪兰我 性格： 性格：脂膜,内向， 晒膜， 内向， 虽然安静可是爱意一切在行动里 一切在行动里 2026 2026年3月30 日 日-4月1日 （共3天） 男主 演技要求- 能够开心和哭泣 能表现獨苦却沉默 表情演技丰富 轻微的情侣肢 体接触比如拥 抱牵手!! 长相要求 i可爱亲切，笑容甜美 可爱亲切， 笑容甜美 2深色发色 色 3偏日系 ４身高： 150cm 165 150cm-165cm cm 加分项服-略 懂日文和爱情 动漫 性格：外向活泼，贴心有观察力 性格： 外向活泼， 贴心有观察力 演技要求- 龍有 演绎开心和伤心， 能有演绎开心和伤心，大笑和果汁 大笑和哭泣 表情演技丰富 女主 有兴趣请联络 Yi Xuan Xuan(AD)+60186654840 (AD) +60186654840'

items.text: Dear All, I am thrilled to share that I've been cast in the upcoming television series TRUST, where I'll be taking on my debut role as a criminal attorney - a challenging yet exciting opportunity that I'm eager to embrace. Rehearsals are currently underway, with filming set to begin next month. While broadcast details are being finalized, I wanted to extend an opportunity to my community to be part of this project. My Assistant Director, B. Winn, invites interested members to consider participating as extras during filming. Please see the attached flyer for more information on how to get involved. I'm looking forward to sharing this experience and appreciate your support as we prepare to bring this inspiring series to life.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'TRUST T.V. SERIES Speaking & Speaking Roles Paid & Unpaid Opportunities Ages 10~ 10~65 Text #TRUST to B. Winn 734.945.2085 Filming Dates: April 6th- 6th-25th - 25th'

Casting Call 
Project Title: MIDNIGHT Production Type: 

Independent Short Film Filming Dates: Beginning early August Location: New Milford, CT

We are currently seeking a talented Afro-Latina actress for a leading role in an upcoming independent short film.

Role Requirements:
* Female, Afro-Latina
* Ages 19–26
* Height between 5’0” and 5’5”
* Must be local to the filming area
* Strong emotional range and ability to convey internal conflict through subtle, nonverbal performance

Project Details:
This is an unpaid opportunity however we will provide:
* On-set meals
* Transportation assistance if needed
* Professional footage for your reel
* A collaborative and supportive creative environment

Filming is scheduled to begin in early August, with exact dates to be confirmed.
We are looking for a dedicated performer who is passionate about storytelling and committed to bringing depth and authenticity to the role.

To Submit: Jonathan.tank59@gmail.com Please send your headshot, resume (if available) and a brief introduction and Include “Casting Submission (Your Name)” in the subject line

Casting Call (Black Male 40-60) *PAID*
Hello to whomever reading, I am a film student and working on a class project called Bring the Beat Back. This project would be based in LA specifically the San Fernando valley. It would be a paid gig that would be shot on the 26th, 27th, and 28th of this month. See more info about the film on the flier. We are looking for someone to play the protagonist Barry, a now washed up rapper who was big in the 80s but has lost his flow since then.

 Also if you're interested in the role of Jay as described on the poster feel free to hit me up as well.

For any questions or if interested about the role please email me at jbf.film@gmail.com

items.text:
## **Casting Call - Short Film - "The Industrial Lark"**
## 
**Logline**

Who could have known that a dream would wake us from sleep. Open our eyes to the darkness shining throughout the City. 
## **Synopsis**

Visited by a dream from the past, an androgynous human, referred to as the Industrial Lark, awakes to the cold chilling their present reality. Meandering through London, they piece together memories of theirs from an age long gone: before industrialisation, before disconnection - when life was greener, and enthused by the harmony between humanity and nature. The deeper the Industrial Lark investigates, however, the more their isolation deepens. 
## **Character: The Industrial Lark**

The Industrial Lark needs to be tall and lank, with features melding both feminine and masculine. Age wise, in their 20s or 30s. A good character and visual reference would be early David Bowie. The role has no dialogue, besides voiceover, meaning the actor chosen must be capable of expressing a wide spectrum of emotions with but their face. We will be filming in areas such as Southwark, Hackney, and Tower Hamlets. The schedule entails a whole day, but may extend to two at the very most. The date, in mind, for shooting is late April. 

We have a Google folder with examples of film inspirations, to better display the Industrial Lark’s style: 

[[https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1aIQuCbXozBxVi1wg5i-CKVnhbwBfIkRH](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1aIQuCbXozBxVi1wg5i-CKVnhbwBfIkRH)](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1aIQuCbXozBxVi1wg5i-CKVnhbwBfIkRH)

This website contains examples of our previous work, including short films, music videos, and some commercial work also:[ [https://www.astray.uk/](https://www.astray.uk/)](https://www.astray.uk/)

This will be an unpaid collaborative short film, with a duration of about five to six minutes. Travel and food will be expensed. 

If interested, please email wightwickmax@gmail.com
items.previewDescription: A London-based film production company that shapes video with a sharp eye and artistic touch. We film, edit, colour, and produce short films, music videos, and aesthetic videos for all sorts of media platforms.

AUDITIONS FOR THE SULTAN OF SULU 

*We are seeking actors to be in our revival of George Ade's classic comic light opera. Actors of Central Asian and/or Filipino descent are encouraged to audition.*

The Sultan of Sulu, named Ki-Ram, along with his wife, concubines, and his Private Secretary Hadji, get tangled up in the Americans' efforts to bring "democracy" and "civilization" to Sulu, born from the dreaming mind of George Ade.

items.text:
Casting Call: 4-minute Student Film
We are a group of four university students looking for actors to star in our 4-minute film for a filmmaking course.

This film explores two long-time friends with things they haven't said to each other in the brief time they have between a nuclear strike warning and their deaths. It is of a more serious tone and contains themes related to mental health, which some may find triggering.

Location: Coquitlam, BC
Shoot date: Either Saturday, March 21st, or Sunday, March 22nd, depending on availability.
Compensation: Meals provided for duration of the shoot time, no monetary compensation.
Union status: Non-Union

Roles:

Character A: young adult roughly university student-aged, any gender and ethnicity

Anxious and emotional person who often worries about being liked by others. Upon the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over the things they won't have time to do in the future. Despite all their self-focused spiraling however, they care deeply about their best friend, Character B.

Character B: young adult roughly university student-aged, any gender and ethnicity

A seemingly aloof person who comes across as very closed off and sardonic. Upon the the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over their past actions. They don't let this show, however, and put on an indifferent face. Character B generally stays very guarded about their life, even around their best friend Character A. Although they have a tendency to lash out at others when faced with emotional vulnerability, they still care very deeply about Character A.

If interested in a role, please contact smp30@sfu.ca with name, headshot, preferred form of contact, and acting reel (if applicable) for further information.
