Anxious and emotional person who often worries about being liked by others. Upon the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over the things they won't have time to do in the future. Despite all their self-focused spiraling however, they care deeply about their best friend, Character B.

Character B: young adult roughly university student-aged, any gender and ethnicity

A seemingly aloof person who comes across as very closed off and sardonic. Upon the the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over their past actions. They don't let this show, however, and put on an indifferent face. Character B generally stays very guarded about their life, even around their best friend Character A. Although they have a tendency to lash out at others when faced with emotional vulnerability, they still care very deeply about Character A.

If interested in a role, please contact smp30@sfu.ca with name, headshot, preferred form of contact, and acting reel (if applicable) for further information.
items.title: Casting Call: 4-minute Student Film

items.text:
Casting call for A Curated Exit (Theatre, Paid, non union)
**Production Company**

Shot in the Dark Productions
**Producer(s)**

Kristy Woollam and Richard White
**Director:**

Richard White
**Union Status**

Non-Union
**Project Type**

Theatre / Live Performance
**Compensation Details**

Profit Share
**Performance Date(s) and Locations**

Winnipeg International Fringe Festival July 13-26, 2026

Edmonton International Fringe Festival August 11-23, 2026

Vancouver - 3 night run, fall 2026 (TBD)
**Submission Deadline**

Friday, April 4, 2026

**Audition Dates and Location**

Vancouver. Call backs week of April 20 - 26th.
**Submission Instructions**

Please contact *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)* to receive sides for a self tape.
Please submit your headshot, acting resume, and self tape to *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)*.
**Project Synopsis**

A Curated Exit is a one act contemporary drama with strong comedic elements. It examines grief, love, and the commercialization of death. Zoe, a funeral director, sells The Device, nanotechnology that vaporizes the body at death and replaces it with a programmed experience. When her husband Steve dies suddenly, Zoe's quest to craft perfect endings collides with loss, memory, and the fragile line between technology and humanity.
**Casting for:**

***STEVE***** **Male lead. Any ethnicity. Age 30-50. Steve is a high school history teacher. He's a geek and loves pop culture. He is gentle and playful and often uses jokes to deflect direct questions about his emotions. He has a strong sense of social justice. Steve loves his wife deeply, but dies suddenly without telling her his biggest secret.

items.text:
THE GIFT OF GAB — GET PAID FOR IT!

We're looking for American-born talkers living in Southern California for a fun 4-hour recorded VO session — answer questions, get expressive, run some dialogues, and help train the next generation of AI. We're on a mission to capture every dialect spoken across the United States. Boston, Texas, Midwest — you name it, we want it. If you grew up anywhere in this country and have an accent to prove it, you're exactly who we're looking for.

$325 an hour for 4 hours. That's $1,300 just for being yourself.

Must be American born and living in SoCal. Data release form required. Your voice goes public to support ethical AI research.

Apply at [https://voices.castingcrane.com/](https://voices.castingcrane.com/)

Or Email [casting@wyldsidemedia.com](mailto:casting@wyldsidemedia.com)

items.text:
Stwórzmy razem coś, czego w polskim internecie jeszcze nie było, czyli przestrzeń, w której różnice nie dzielą, a uczą 🤝

Tworzymy nowy format debat i szukamy właśnie Ciebie

Chcemy stworzyć miejsce, w którym można się naprawdę usłyszeć

Bez krzyków, bez przerywania, bez udawania, że tylko jedna strona ma rację. Wierzymy, że nawet przy skrajnie różnych poglądach można rozmawiać z szacunkiem

To nie będzie kolejna internetowa kłótnia

To będzie rozmowa, w której liczy się odwaga, otwartość mózgu i umiejętność słuchania
* Nie szukamy osób, które ze wszystkim się zgadzają
* Nie szukamy też tych, którzy chcą tylko "wygrać”
* Zależy nam na autentyczności, a nie "zagranej" roli

Szukamy ludzi, którzy:
* mają własne zdanie
* potrafią je obronić, ale też wysłuchać drugiej strony
* chcą budować, a nie niszczyć

Jeśli chcesz zmierzyć się w rozmowie z kimś o zupełnie innych poglądach, w atmosferze szacunku i bezpieczeństwa - to miejsce dla Ciebie

Zgłoś się do nas, chętnym osobom prześlemy krótką ankietę do wypełnienia

Poprosimy też o krótkie nagranie, w którym odpowiesz na jedno z pytań

Projekt jest płatny 💸

Po więcej szczegółów zapraszam na priv lub pod adresem: wiktoria.casting@gmail.com

i will be leading in a major SAG film coming out soon as well as leading in THREE movies going on NETFLIX next year that im leading in as well!

items.text:
Casting for voiceover actors for PODCAST in Los Angeles for mid-April. 

🎭 **CASTING CALL: SINGLE & READY TO MINGLE**

We’re looking for talented actors to bring our faith-filled dramedy ***Single & Ready to Mingle: A Faith-Filled Experience*** to life.

Set at a Christian singles retreat, this story follows three women navigating love, faith, temptation, and second chances during one unforgettable weekend.

Think **sisterhood, secrets, laughter, and spiritual growth** — with a little romance and chaos along the way.

✨ Multiple roles available
✨ Faith-based dramedy series
✨ Strong, dynamic characters

**Ready to mingle?**

🎬 **Apply for casting —copy and paste link. **https://form.jotform.com/250552717627157

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde, ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und beginne diesen September meine Ausbildung als Mediengestalter Bild/Ton an der Lazi Akademie in Esslingen. Allerdings habe ich vor schon jetzt anzufangen ein paar Kurzfilme zu drehen, und wollte in die Runde fragen wer Interesse hätte   kreative ideen mitzugestalten und villeicht sogar auch schon coole Ideen hat. Ich  suche auch eine Schauspielerin oder Sängerin die gut English lesen und sprechen kann um  eine paar  minutiges Sci-fi Video zu kommentieren, Schreibt mich gerne an. und ich werde alles detalliert erklären. Viele Grüße und hoffe sehen  uns bald am Filmset  😊
Edit: Ich wollte euch noch fragen ob jemand schon Equipment hat um bei Kurzfilmen mitzumachen, oder ob jemand Erfahrungen hat, wo man sich Equipment am besten ausleihen kann.

If you enjoy working with children and want to help create a fun, memorable summer experience, we encourage you to apply today!

We offer schools, arts infused programming throughout the school year and Musical theatre camp options in the Summer. Please view our history, events, donate and employment opportunities.

items.text:
Hi All! Seeking extra age 40-70, Sunday - Clinton Hill, Brooklyn.
I’m looking for a final extra for my Stony Brook University student film shooting this Sunday! The film is about a woman looking back at a childhood memory. It is at a church in Clinton Hill. Just needing one more person in their 40s - 60s to serve as an extra in an AA meeting scene. Pay, food, and footage provided.

Email jeanne.grutchfield@stonybrook.edu

if you are free from 7-9 on Sunday when the scene is being filmed! 

Seeking:

[SAL] An extra in an AA meeting. One line. 40-70.

Storyline: Hi! You would be playing an extra in the film during an AA scene. There would be one speaking line. The film starts at the AA meeting, a woman reflecting on a childhood memory. Food and footage provided!

topComments.text: 7-9am or PM? Male or female extra?

items.summary:
Hi All! Seeking extra age 40-70, Sunday - Clinton Hill, Brooklyn.
I’m looking for a final extra for my Stony Brook University student film shooting this Sunday! The film is about a woman looking back at a childhood memory. It is at a church in Clinton Hill. Just needing one more person in their 40s - 60s to serve as an extra in an AA meeting scene. Pay, food, and footage provided.

Email jeanne.grutchfield@stonybrook.edu

if you are free from 7-9 on Sunday when the scene is being filmed! 

Seeking:

[SAL] An extra in an AA meeting. One line. 40-70.

Storyline: Hi! You would be playing an extra in the film during an AA scene. There would be one speaking line. The film starts at the AA meeting, a woman reflecting on a childhood memory. Food and footage provided!
items.title: Hi All! Seeking extra age 40-70, Sunday - Clinton Hill, Brooklyn.

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

items.text:
Hugh Grant made an entire cinema go silent.

Not with a dramatic speech. Not with tears. With a cup of tea and a smile. 😳

He's playing a kidnapper in Heretic. And he is genuinely terrifying.

But here's what got me thinking...

He's not playing terrifying at all.

He's playing something else entirely. And that one choice is the reason the performance works — and why so many actors struggle without even knowing it.

I made a lesson about it this week.

Because the principle Hugh Grant is using? It's the same one that separates actors who feel a performance from actors who give one.

Most actors are told to "be angry." "Be sad." "Be charming."

And most actors have no idea how to actually do that — because it's the wrong instruction.

Two words fix it. And once you hear them, you'll use them every time you pick up a script.

🎬 Link in the comments below.
items.title: Why Great Actors Never Play Emotions | The Hugh Grant Secret

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

items.text: Improvisation & Script Online Workshop with BAFTA-winning director Steve Hughes.

sharedPost.text:
Most actors train one way, directors work another.

On set, it’s not about performance, it’s about what feels real on camera.

That’s why this session matters.

Join BAFTA-winning director Steve Hughes (Casualty, Doctor Who, Death in Paradise, Midsomer Murders)

Known for his actor-first approach, Steve helps actors unlock instinct, take risks, and deliver performances that feel truthful and alive on screen, using both improvisation and scripted work.

IMPROVISATION & SCRIPT ONLINE WORKSHOP

📅 Saturday 18th April
🕒 2:30pm or 6:30pm (GMT)
💷 £65

Rare access to how a working TV director actually works with actors.

DM us to book your place.

#actor #actress #actingtips #acting

***CASTING CALL***

❗*ʀᴇᴀᴅ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ*❗

ʙʀɪᴇꜰ  #087
 
ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ: ɴᴇᴛꜰʟɪx/ɢᴀᴍʙɪᴛ
ᴘʀᴏᴊᴇᴄᴛ: ʙꜱ
 
ꜱʜᴏᴏᴛ ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇ: ᴀꜱᴀᴘ (ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ɪɴ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ᴜɴᴛɪʟ ᴇɴᴅ ᴀᴘʀɪʟ)
ʙᴀꜱᴇᴄᴀᴍᴘ: ᴏᴏꜱᴛᴇʀᴢᴇᴇ ꜱᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴘᴀʀᴋ ᴀɴᴅ ʀɪᴅᴇ

ʀᴏʟᴇ: ꜱᴛᴜᴅᴇɴᴛꜱ/ᴀᴅᴜʟᴛꜱ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅ

ᴍɪɴɪᴍᴜᴍ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ: 
* ᴀɴʏ ɢᴇɴᴅᴇʀ
* ᴄᴀᴜᴄᴀꜱɪᴀɴꜱ ᴏɴʟʏ
* 15 - 65 ʏʀꜱ ᴏꜰ ᴀɢᴇ

ʀᴀᴛᴇꜱ:
* ᴅᴀʏ ʀᴀᴛᴇ - ʀ400

ᴛᴏ ᴀᴘᴘʟʏ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ɴᴀʟᴇᴅɪ ᴏɴ 0761802729 ᴡɪᴛʜ:
* ʙʀɪᴇꜰ # | ꜰᴜʟʟ ɴᴀᴍᴇ 
* ᴍᴇᴀꜱᴜʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ
* 1 ʀᴇᴄᴇɴᴛ ʜᴇᴀᴅꜱʜᴏᴛꜱ
* 2 ʀᴇᴄᴇɴᴛ ꜰᴜʟʟ ʟᴇɴɢᴛʜ

ᴊᴏɪɴ ᴏᴜʀ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ ꜰᴏʀ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ɪɴ ꜱᴏᴜᴛʜ ᴀꜰʀɪᴄᴀ:
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

___

ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ᴀ ᴍᴏᴍᴇɴᴛ ᴛᴏ ᴀʟꜱᴏ ᴇɴᴊᴏʏ ᴀ ɢᴏᴏᴅ ʀᴇᴀᴅ:
naledigoottsch.com/blog

CHICAGO.          CHICAGO

PAID ACTORS - NON UNION

Casting Call! Children, Female & Male Talent Needed

I’m the producer for this award-winning production. We are currently seeking actors to audition self-tapes,  all selected actors will be called back for an in person a audition.

If you’re interested please email us at BTDcasting2026@gmail.com and we will send you the sides to work from. 

Singing is a plus. 

The character and concept is unusual and so we are very open as to who can submit!

It's Your Time To SHINE!!!

BTD

#awardwinningplay
#letsgo

items.text:
Live mascot performer needed - $100/hour. 

Slender build required. Experience with mascot or walkaround costumes preferred but not required. 

Professional headshot/photos not required. To apply, please send current front and back full-body photos along with waist and thigh measurements to marketing@agoradata.com 

This role is for a dynamic performer to bring a robot character to life at an upcoming business conference at the Gaylord Rockies Resort & Convention Center in Aurora, CO. Theatre students and those with theater experience are encouraged to apply.  Conference setup can be seen here: [https://agoradata.com/bots](https://agoradata.com/bots)

**Total of 14.25 hours over three days at $100/hour**

 

📅 Dates/Times (exact times may vary):

• Saturday, June 20, 2026 (1-hour fitting, time TBD)

• Sunday, June 21: 6:45 PM - 9:00 PM

• Monday, June 22: 3:45 PM - 8:30 PM 

• Tuesday, June 23: 10:45 AM - 6:45 PM (with 1:45 unpaid break)

 

📍 Location: Gaylord Rockies Resort & Convention Center in Aurora, CO

💲 Total Compensation: $1,425.00 (exact amount may vary)

🎭 Role Details below 

 

𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥-𝐛𝐨𝐝𝐲 𝐫𝐨𝐛𝐨𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐦𝐞 (non-speaking, with a rigid, stylized head and joint flexibility at shoulders and hips). Role requires standing, walking, and dance-like movement. Dance-like movement can be seen here: [https://www.facebook.com/reel/1272186121164710](https://nam10.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Freel%2F1272186121164710&data=05%7C02%7Clesly.kenney%40agoradata.com%7Cb37ce90dede74c16455908de0fe79988%7C34eb4551678e4ae5b140a340a1fa9576%7C0%7C0%7C638965684588130690%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=Uo0ibzyVEDvQgrkpZexa2EFzEWCV8OLwVBKb8XMCCW4%3D&reserved=0) 

Physical requirements:  

• Performer height: 5'9" – 6'1"

• 30" max pants waist size

• 23" max thigh circumference

 

This is a fun, high-visibility role perfect for performers with energy, presence, and comfort in costume work.

items.text:
Short film roles - grandfather and grandson
Hey yall,

Looking to fill a couple of roles on a short film. Should be about two shoot days total, maybe split up into some half days. The script is only about 3 pages.

Will be shot primarily around Colorado Springs.

ROLE 1:

Grandpa 

Age: 65+

ROLE 2:

Grandson

Age: 20s

Both roles will involve pretending to work on a car. It would be beneficial if the grandpa character has any experience wrenching but is not at all necessary since I will be directing that anyway. The grandson character has zero mechanical experience so that doesn't matter.

Not looking for anything specific looks-wise. Just hoping to find a match up that could convincingly be related. Bonus points if I can get a pair who actually is related!

Shoot me a message or if we chatted about my last short about a year ago, feel free to just email me again.

Can't pay a whole heck of a lot but I'm willing to pay!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people

topComments.text: I can do Grandpa if you still need someone.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎one or more people, people smiling and ‎text that says '‎L M ・ー اع CO NEVADA SIERRA MOUNTAINS MOUNTAINS TAINS‎'‎‎

items.text:
Last call for auditions for Darjeeling!
We are still in need of a Josey! Butches and mascs, please give it a go!

Title: Darjeeling

Genre: Romantic drama

Logline: Two ex-roommates with a past full of loose ends reconnect over an imminent tragedy.

Roles (Casting all races and ethnicities. Trans/queer people and people of color encouraged to audition!):

Tate: 24 (casting 18-25), femme lesbian, painter. Distraught at the prospect of a family tragedy, she turns to the only person she knows can help her.

Josey: 23 (casting 18-25), non-binary butch lesbian, muse. It’s been years, Josey knows that—but they’ll be damned if they’re leaving Tate to worry alone tonight.

Extras: We will need extras to mill about an art gallery for the final scene. No restrictions on casting.

Production Team: Parker Watson - Director, Louis White - Producer

Production Type: CU Denver Student Film

Contact Information: DarjeelingShortFilm@gmail.com or @darjeelingfilm on Instagram. Please send any questions there.

Run Time: 7-minute short

Compensation: Unpaid, snacks and meals provided!

Union Status: Non-union

Audition Information: Self-tapes are accepted through March 14 at this link: https://forms.gle/RnKkEq6oPWTgA7v78 

Shooting Schedule: April 2-5. Only 2 shoot days should be needed, so if you have conflicts, please still apply!

Filming Location: CU Denver campus and downtown Denver

Note: This film will be shown at CU Denver's Cinefest in mid-May. All cast and crew are welcome to come and will receive further information as filming progresses.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text

topComments.text: Are you still in need of extras? Im available on Sat April 4th.

items.text:
TIL TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - HANDEST JYLLAND 

Vi får mange henvendelser, men mangler lige de sidste på plads, der er et match med hår og tøjstr. Se nedenfor.

5 MANDLIGE statistroller som funktionær, alder ca. 25 - 50 år
1 KVINDELIG statistrolle som servitrice/kollega til birolle, 
alder ca. 20-30 år

Du skal kunne komme til Handest mandag 16/3 kl. 9.00 - ca. kl. 11 til en kostume/sminkeprøve, så kostume og hår er klar til optagelse.

Du skal senere på dagen kunne være med til optagelse 
16/3 ca. 15 - 02 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i en togvogn både holdende og kørende.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage + 1 sminke/kostumeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-M, ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne lave sideskilning med mindre naturlig skaldet, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage. Du skal kunne se uden briller, da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

KVINDE:
max højde 175, tøjstr. XS-S (der er kun 1 kostume muligt), ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. arm, håndled, eyeliner og øjenbryn, ingen piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet, korthåret til max længde skuldre med mindre du vil lade dig klippe til dette, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen hårextensions.
Du skal kunne se uden briller da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt en selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

TIL TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - HANDEST JYLLAND
